title: Vercel and Shopify are rebuilding Hydrogen
summary: Vercel and Shopify are rebuilding Hydrogen
whyItMatters: Hydrogen made headless storefronts easy to ship, but not portable. At Vercel Ship 26 in New York, we announced that we are working with Shopify to rebuild it from the ground up, a shared bet on a more open web. The new version is open source and runtime agnostic, meaning it can run anywhere JavaScript does. You can build with Svelte , Nuxt , Next.js or even…
